meta.title: Drop No. · Sealed drops for premium watches
meta.description: A house of sealed drops for premium watchmaking. Hidden bid, single price set at the reveal.

footer.tagline: A house of sealed drops for premium watches. One piece a week, a single price set at the reveal.
footer.commitment1: Pieces direct from the houses, never resold

home.eyebrow: House of sealed drops · premium watchmaking
home.title: One piece. One price. Set at the reveal.
home.intro: Each week, a house opens a drop. You seal your bid. The highest bids win, and all pay the same price: that of the last winning bid. No overbidding, no price war.
home.mechanismDetail: The mechanism in detail, with a worked example →
home.manifesto: Not a marketplace. One house, one piece, one appointment a week.
home.manifestoSub: Direct from the houses, no resale, no middleman. Insured delivery, verified identity, 14-day withdrawal. No buyer fees.
